patterns.pattern: ^A thorny vine reaches out from (\w+) and pierces through (.+)'s translucent shield, causing it to fade\.$
^You summon a blade of wind to shear at the magical shield of (.+), but find no such barrier\.$
^You summon a blade of condensed air and shear cleanly through the protective shield surrounding (.+)\.$
^\w+ summons a blade of condensed air and shears cleanly through the magical shield surrounding (.+)\.$
^(You) command the razor-edged thorny vines around you to lash out and rend the flesh of (.+)\.$
^The thorny vines of the Viridian (\w+) lash out and rip into (.+)'s flesh\.$
